title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・リザルト

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide wins the spring Tenno Sho. But
even so, the racing world still sees her as no more
than Narita Brian's sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the venue for the race hadn't been changed,
Biwa Hayahide could've maximized the results of
her equation and put on an even better
performance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she reminds me that there's no use dwelling
on something we had no control over and urges
me to focus on the future instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the exclusive Takarazuka Kinen,
where only the best are chosen to race. We begin
working hard so Biwa Hayahide can show the
racing world just how strong she is.
